_comment: Age (epoch) definitions for Aurora Dusk: Steam Age. Ages 0-4 are the base game; age 5 (steamAge) is the Steam Age expansion. The 'time' field is the in-game timer value required to advance to this age. 'no' is the sort order. 'message' is shown to the player on reaching that age (absent for woodenAge since it is the starting age).

message.EN: You have reached the Stone Age.
message.FR: Vous avez atteint l'Âge de Pierre.
message.DE: Du Hast das Stein Zeitalter erreicht!
message.JP: 石の時代に到達しました

message.EN: You have reached the Iron Age.
message.FR: Vous avez atteint l'Âge de Fer.
message.DE: Du hast das Eisen Zeitalter erreicht!
message.JP: 鉄の時代に到達しました

message.EN: You have reached the Ether Age.
message.FR: Vous avez atteint l'Âge de l'Éther.
message.DE: Du hast das Ether Zeitalter erreicht
message.JP: エーテルの時代に到達しました

message.EN: You have reached the Gold Age.
message.DE: Du hast das Goldene Zeitalter erreich
message.JP: 黄金の時代に到達しました

message.EN: You have reached the Steam Age.
message.FR: Vous avez atteint l'Âge de la Vapeur.
message.DE: Du hast das Steam Zeitalter erreicht
message.JP: 蒸気の時代に到達しました
